working_on: Backlog batch close (5 items): admin closes #66 + #70 + #92; .editorconfig (#78); #107 option A (parent_ff() identical-content auto-recovery + update_settings.py + ADR 0054 amendment + first-exercise readiness note).

T1-B of the new readiness note closed in-session naturally - the deliverable push's parent-FF stderr matched the readiness-note prediction byte-for-byte against the parent's pre-existing pyproject.toml residual divergence ('working-tree diverges from origin/main on [pyproject.toml]; manual recovery required'); state NOT mutated. side_discoveries.description: Parent repo (/Users/shanekidd/Documents/Claude_Files/Paideia/) carries a pre-existing uncommitted modification to pyproject.toml: a 4-line documentation comment block (lines 17-20) reading 'Floors bumped at S-0147 to current installed transitive (Dependabot batch #94-#105; consolidated into a single floor-alignment commit per ADR 0080's Phase B exercise; the installed transitive predates the floor bumps - the lockfile already records these versions).' Present in parent's working tree; absent from origin/main. Was the diverged-content blocker for in-session T1-A closure of the new parent_ff auto-recovery readiness note. Recommendation: either (1) commit the comment block from the parent (matches the floor-bump rationale already in origin/main; supplemental documentation), or (2) discard via git -C /Users/shanekidd/Documents/Claude_Files/Paideia checkout pyproject.toml. Until resolved, every parent-FF in this worktree exercises the diverged-content bail path of the new auto-recovery (correctly — wrapper exits 0; state not mutated). Closes T1-A path of engine/build_readiness/parent_ff_auto_recovery_first_exercise.md when resolved.

The deliverable push (build_lifecycle_push.py deliverable mode, 4 commits batched via catchup-aware shape per ADR 0076 Amendment v3) naturally exercised the new parent_ff() auto-recovery's diverged-content bail path. Wrapper stderr reported exactly the diagnostic predicted in the readiness note: 'parent FF best-effort failed: working-tree diverges from origin/main on [pyproject.toml]; manual recovery required'. State not mutated; wrapper exit 0; push succeeded (deliverables landed on origin/main). T1-B of engine/build_readiness/parent_ff_auto_recovery_first_exercise.md closes in-session. T1-A defers to a future session whose parent repo is clean (or to a session where .claude/settings.json is edited + update_settings.py is invoked AND the pyproject.toml residual is no longer the diverged blocker).
